expect.note: The zlib root directory has no native cc_test targets. Real test sources (test/example.c, test/infcover.c, test/minigzip.c) live in test/ which is gazelle:excluded and is driven by CMake/configure, not Bazel. gazelle_cc will not generate cc_test rules at the root, so this is informational only; honest ceiling for this approach is tier-2 (root library builds).

No native Bazel test targets exist in scope //:all (tests are excluded and CMake/configure-driven). A bazel test over //:all with no test targets is informational and must not be counted as a native-suite pass. Do not accept a worker-authored smoke test here.
